calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Plaintiff Janet Brayer, Esq. present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Sylvia Rice as follows:
Damages $1,097.41
Costs $557.00, for a total of $1,654.41
Judgment signed in open court.
